title: habenaria agasthyamalaiana
intro: Habenaria agasthyamalaiana, a rare orchid species found in the Western Ghats of India, is a type of terrestrial orchid belonging to the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Habenaria agasthyamalaiana include its potential to treat various health issues, such as fever, skin disorders, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or extracts, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
